zh.lifeSummary: Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin是neel II de Saint Sauveur和Adèle de Brionne的兒子，於1005年出生在法國巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉索維爾。他和Adela de Vernon至少有7個兒子和2個女兒。他於1066年登記服兵役。他去世於1073年在法國巴-諾門迪曼其傑爾布格享年68歲，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯芭黎絲沙吉索維爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Neel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval short form of Eleanor , Ellen , and Helen . For the initial N-, compare Nan and Ned . It was the name by which Charles II's mistress Eleanor Gwyn ( 1650–87 ) was universally known to her contemporaries, and at about that time it also became established as an independent name.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin was born in 1005, in Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Lower Normandy, France as the son of neel II de Saint Sauveur and Adèle de Brionne. He had at least 7 sons and 2 daughters with Adela de Vernon. He registered for military service in 1066. He died in 1073, in Cherbourg, Manche, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 68, and was buried in Saint-Sauveur, Paris, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin est né en 1005, à Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, fils de neel II de Saint Sauveur et Adèle de Brionne. Il a eu au moins 7 fils et 2 filles avec Adela de Vernon. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1066. Il est décédé en 1073, à Cherbourg, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Sauveur, Paris, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin wurde 1005 in Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich, als Sohn von neel II de Saint Sauveur und Adèle de Brionne geboren. Er hatte mit Adela de Vernon mindestens 7 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1066 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1073 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Cherbourg, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Sauveur, Paris, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin è nato il nel 1005 nel Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia come figlio di neel II de Saint Sauveur e Adèle de Brionne. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli e 2 figlie con Adela de Vernon. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1066. Morì nel 1073, nel Cherbourg, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Sauveur, Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentinは1005年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサイント-サウベウルでneel II de Saint SauveurとAdèle de Brionneの息子として生まれた。彼はAdela de Vernonとの間に少なくとも7人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1066年に兵役登録をした。彼は1073年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェチェルボウルグで68歳で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスパーイスサイント-サウベウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin(은)는 1005년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 세인트-소브우르에서 neel II de Saint Sauveur(와)과 Adèle de Brionne의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Adela de Vernon(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1066년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1073년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 처보우르그에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 파리스 세인트-소브우르에 묻혔다.

mn.St Sauvuer, Normandy or Halton, Cheshire: Halton, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin nasceu em 1005, em Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França filho de neel II de Saint Sauveur e Adèle de Brionne. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos e 2 filhas com Adela de Vernon. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1066. Ele faleceu em 1073, em Cherbourg, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Sauveur, Paris, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin родился в 1005 г. в местности сеинт-саувеур, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция. Его родителей звали neel II de Saint Sauveur и Adèle de Brionne. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 2 дочери от Adela de Vernon. В 1066 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1073 г. в местности чирбург, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-саувеур, пэрис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

sm.from 1021 to 1053: mai le 1021 e o'o I le 1053

es.lifeSummary: Neel IV de St Sauveur Vicomte de Cotentin nació en 1005, en Saint-Sauveur, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia como hijo de neel II de Saint Sauveur y Adèle de Brionne. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos y 2 hijas con Adela de Vernon. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1066. Murió en 1073, en Cherbourg, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Sauveur, Paris, Île-de-France, Francia.
